sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 6

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 6:1
items.html: (to the question) You already know that the Bi'a Kadma'a [first coming] of ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] Panim be Panim [face-to-face] is in the hall of AVI [Aba ve Ima]. Therefore the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] of the souls — which are the lower one of the Nukva, cleaving to her AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] at the time of that Zivug [coupling] — cannot receive there any form of Ibur [conception], since for them that Zivug stands at the third degree, above their root; for the root of every lower one is only in its own upper one, as is known. Hence "the woman does not conceive" with these MAN that cleave to her AHP; rather afterwards, in the second coming — namely, her coming to her place — the MAN then receive the form of an embryo. (p. 740, Item 9)
